================================================================================
type_annotation
================================================================================
main : Try({}, [])
main =
{
	task = a
	task
    }
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (record_type))
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (tags_type))))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (value_declaration
          (decl_left
            (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          body: (expr_body
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

================================================================================
internal
================================================================================
main=
  {
  p:Int
  p=10
  p
  }
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (value_declaration
          (annotation_type_def
            (annotation_pre_colon
              (identifier))
            (apply_type
              (concrete_type)))
          (decl_left
            (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          body: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

================================================================================
types_nominal_simple
================================================================================
Username :: Str
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (opaque_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    (double_colon)
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))))

================================================================================
types_nominal_with_methods
================================================================================
Color := [Red, Green, Blue].{
    as_str : Color -> Str
    as_str = |c| c
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (nominal_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    (colon_equals)
    (tags_type
      (tag_type)
      (tag_type)
      (tag_type))
    (nominal_methods
      (value_declaration
        (annotation_type_def
          (annotation_pre_colon
            (identifier))
          (function_type
            param: (apply_type
              (concrete_type))
            (arrow)
            (apply_type
              (concrete_type))))
        (decl_left
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (anon_fun_expr
            args: (argument_patterns
              (identifier_pattern
                (identifier)))
            body: (expr_body
              (variable_expr
                (identifier)))))))))

================================================================================
types_nominal_empty_methods
================================================================================
Wrapper := Str.{}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (nominal_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    (colon_equals)
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    (nominal_methods)))

================================================================================
types_functions
================================================================================
A: R,(B(a)
  ->Int)
  ->String

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (alias_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    body: (function_type
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type))
      param: (parenthesized_type
        (function_type
          param: (apply_type
            (concrete_type)
            type_args: (apply_type_arg
              (bound_variable)))
          (arrow)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type))))
      (arrow)
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)))))

================================================================================
types_alias
================================================================================
A:A b
a:A->B
a=|a| b
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (alias_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    body: (apply_type
      (concrete_type)))
  (expr_body
    (variable_expr
      (identifier)))
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (function_type
        param: (apply_type
          (concrete_type))
        (arrow)
        (apply_type
          (concrete_type))))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))

================================================================================
types_nested_func
================================================================================
fun:  a,
  (
    a,
    b->
    S(a)
  )->
  (SS(b)->
  b)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (function_type
      param: (bound_variable)
      param: (tuple_type
        (bound_variable)
        (function_type
          param: (bound_variable)
          (arrow)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)
            type_args: (apply_type_arg
              (bound_variable)))))
      (arrow)
      (parenthesized_type
        (function_type
          param: (apply_type
            (concrete_type)
            type_args: (apply_type_arg
              (bound_variable)))
          (arrow)
          (bound_variable))))))

================================================================================
types_tuples
================================================================================
a:(Num(a),Num(b))
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (tuple_type
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (bound_variable)))
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (bound_variable))))))

================================================================================
types_args
================================================================================
A b : B b

A2 b2 c2 : B2 b2 c2
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (expr_body
    (tag_expr
      (tag
        (identifier))))
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type)))
  (expr_body
    (variable_expr
      (identifier)))
  (expr_body
    (tag_expr
      (tag
        (identifier))))
  (expr_body
    (variable_expr
      (identifier)))
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type)))
  (expr_body
    (variable_expr
      (identifier)))
  (expr_body
    (variable_expr
      (identifier))))

================================================================================
types_paren_generic
================================================================================
foo : List(a) -> List(a)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (function_type
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (bound_variable)))
      (arrow)
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (bound_variable))))))

================================================================================
types_paren_generic_multi
================================================================================
foo : Result(Ok, Err) -> Bool
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (function_type
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type))))
      (arrow)
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)))))

================================================================================
types_effectful_simple
================================================================================
print! : Str => {}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (function_type
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type))
      (fat_arrow)
      (record_type))))

================================================================================
types_effectful_with_return
================================================================================
main! : List(Str) => Try({}, [Exit(I32)])
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (function_type
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type))))
      (fat_arrow)
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (record_type))
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (tags_type
            (tag_type
              type_args: (apply_type_arg
                (apply_type
                  (concrete_type))))))))))

================================================================================
types_effectful_multi_arg
================================================================================
write! : Str, Str => Try({}, Str)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (function_type
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type))
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type))
      (fat_arrow)
      (apply_type
        (concrete_type)
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (record_type))
        type_args: (apply_type_arg
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))))))

===
types_static_basic
===
helper1 : a -> b where [a.to_str : a -> b]
helper1 = |x| x.to_str()
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (where_implements
        type: (function_type
          param: (bound_variable)
          (arrow)
          (bound_variable))
        (where)
        implements: (static_dispatch_list
          (static_dispatch
            (static_dispatch_target
              (bound_variable)
              (identifier))
            (function_type
              param: (bound_variable)
              (arrow)
              (bound_variable))))))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (field_access_expr
              target: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              (identifier))))))))

===
types_static_complex
===
modify : a, (Str -> Str) -> a where [a.transform : a, (Str -> Str) -> a]
modify = |x, fn| x.transform(fn)

multi_fun: b -> c where [b.b_thing : b, d -> c, b.str_thing : b, Str -> d]

---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (where_implements
        type: (function_type
          param: (bound_variable)
          param: (parenthesized_type
            (function_type
              param: (apply_type
                (concrete_type))
              (arrow)
              (apply_type
                (concrete_type))))
          (arrow)
          (bound_variable))
        (where)
        implements: (static_dispatch_list
          (static_dispatch
            (static_dispatch_target
              (bound_variable)
              (identifier))
            (function_type
              param: (bound_variable)
              param: (parenthesized_type
                (function_type
                  param: (apply_type
                    (concrete_type))
                  (arrow)
                  (apply_type
                    (concrete_type))))
              (arrow)
              (bound_variable))))))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier))
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (field_access_expr
              target: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              (identifier))
            args: (variable_expr
              (identifier)))))))
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (where_implements
      type: (function_type
        param: (bound_variable)
        (arrow)
        (bound_variable))
      (where)
      implements: (static_dispatch_list
        (static_dispatch
          (static_dispatch_target
            (bound_variable)
            (identifier))
          (function_type
            param: (bound_variable)
            param: (bound_variable)
            (arrow)
            (bound_variable)))
        (static_dispatch
          (static_dispatch_target
            (bound_variable)
            (identifier))
          (function_type
            param: (bound_variable)
            param: (apply_type
              (concrete_type))
            (arrow)
            (bound_variable)))))))

===
types_tag_union_extensible
===
# Type alias for an extensible tag union. You can use a type var (`others`) like so:
Letters(others) : [A, B, ..others]
---

(file
  (line_comment)
  (alias_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type)
      type_args: (apply_type_arg
        (bound_variable)))
    body: (tags_type
      (tag_type)
      (tag_type)
      (spread_type
        (type_variable
          (bound_variable))))))

===
types_static_basic
===
helper1 : a -> b where [a.to_str : a -> b]
helper1 = |x| x.to_str()
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (where_implements
        type: (function_type
          param: (bound_variable)
          (arrow)
          (bound_variable))
        (where)
        implements: (static_dispatch_list
          (static_dispatch
            (static_dispatch_target
              (bound_variable)
              (identifier))
            (function_type
              param: (bound_variable)
              (arrow)
              (bound_variable))))))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (field_access_expr
              target: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              (identifier))))))))

===
types_static_complex
===
modify : a, (Str -> Str) -> a where [a.transform : a, (Str -> Str) -> a]
modify = |x, fn| x.transform(fn)

multi_fun: b -> c where [b.b_thing : b, d -> c, b.str_thing : b, Str -> d]
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (where_implements
        type: (function_type
          param: (bound_variable)
          param: (parenthesized_type
            (function_type
              param: (apply_type
                (concrete_type))
              (arrow)
              (apply_type
                (concrete_type))))
          (arrow)
          (bound_variable))
        (where)
        implements: (static_dispatch_list
          (static_dispatch
            (static_dispatch_target
              (bound_variable)
              (identifier))
            (function_type
              param: (bound_variable)
              param: (parenthesized_type
                (function_type
                  param: (apply_type
                    (concrete_type))
                  (arrow)
                  (apply_type
                    (concrete_type))))
              (arrow)
              (bound_variable))))))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier))
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (field_access_expr
              target: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              (identifier))
            args: (variable_expr
              (identifier)))))))
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (where_implements
      type: (function_type
        param: (bound_variable)
        (arrow)
        (bound_variable))
      (where)
      implements: (static_dispatch_list
        (static_dispatch
          (static_dispatch_target
            (bound_variable)
            (identifier))
          (function_type
            param: (bound_variable)
            param: (bound_variable)
            (arrow)
            (bound_variable)))
        (static_dispatch
          (static_dispatch_target
            (bound_variable)
            (identifier))
          (function_type
            param: (bound_variable)
            param: (apply_type
              (concrete_type))
            (arrow)
            (bound_variable)))))))
